values.value: arrayReduce('sumMap', [CAST(arrayMap(x -> tuple(concat('key', cityHash64(x * (number + 1)) % 2000), cityHash64((number * x) + 1) % CAST('25555', 'Int64')), range(50)), 'Map(String, Int64)')])

test.create_query: CREATE TABLE t_json_typed_paths_no_hints(data JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE t_json_typed_paths_with_hints(data JSON(key1 Int64, key2 Int64, key3 Int64, key4 Int64, key5 Int64, key6 Int64, key7 Int64, key8 Int64, key9 Int64, key10 Int64, key11 Int64, key12 Int64, key13 Int64, key14 Int64, key15 Int64, key16 Int64, key17 Int64, key18 Int64, key19 Int64, key20 Int64, key21 Int64, key22 Int64, key23 Int64, key24 Int64, key25 Int64, key26 Int64, key27 Int64, key28 Int64, key29 Int64, key30 Int64, key31 Int64, key32 Int64, key33 Int64, key34 Int64, key35 Int64, key36 Int64, key37 Int64, key38 Int64, key39 Int64, key40 Int64, key41 Int64, key42 Int64, key43 Int64, key44 Int64, key45 Int64, key46 Int64, key47 Int64, key48 Int64, key49 Int64, key50 Int64, key51 Int64, key52 Int64, key53 Int64, key54 Int64, key55 Int64, key56 Int64, key57 Int64, key58 Int64, key59 Int64, key60 Int64, key61 Int64, key62 Int64, key63 Int64, key64 Int64, key65 Int64, key66 Int64, key67 Int64, key68 Int64, key69 Int64, key70 Int64, key71 Int64, key72 Int64, key73 Int64, key398 Int64, key399 Int64, key400 Int64)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.query: INSERT INTO t_json_typed_paths_no_hints SELECT {json_map} FROM numbers(1000)
INSERT INTO t_json_typed_paths_with_hints SELECT {json_map} FROM numbers(1000)
